title: UDF manifest.json
description: Metadata, embedding configuration, and organisational metadata for a UDF archive.

doc_id.description: Unique URL-safe slug for the document. Derived from filename by splitting CamelCase and replacing spaces with hyphens. Must match doc_id in catalogue.json and content.json.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of archive creation.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model identifier, e.g. "huggingface/all-MiniLM-L6-v2". Null if no embeddings.

embedding_dims.description: Number of embedding dimensions. Null if no embeddings.

quantization.description: Quantization mode used for stored embeddings.

section_count.description: Total number of sections. Must equal length of catalogue.json section_index.

intelligence.description: True if AI-generated intelligence fields (summaries, insights, keywords) are populated.

embedding_format.description: (v1.1) Storage format for embeddings. "base64" = per-section base64 strings in catalogue.json (legacy). "binary" = flat binary blob in embeddings.bin (preferred).

source_path.description: Original file path at conversion time.

producer.description: Name and version of the software that wrote this archive, e.g. "docnest-ai 1.0".

owner.description: (v1.1) Person or system that owns this document, e.g. "Alice Johnson" or "finance-team".

tags.description: (v1.1) Free-form lowercase labels for search and filtering.

access_roles.description: (v1.1) Roles permitted to read this archive. Use ["*"] for unrestricted access.

last_updated.description: (v1.1) ISO 8601 date or datetime of the last content update.

custom.description: Arbitrary extension data. Use this key for any implementation-specific fields.
